articles.headline: Fantasy hockey rest-of-season rankings: MacKinnon, Celebrini lead rankings ahead of fantasy finals
articles.description: Rest-of-season rankings to help guide your trade offers and lineup moves heading into the fantasy hockey finals.

images.caption: Jack Hughes returned to the New Jersey Devils lineup after his hand injury.
